utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Each must be fully specified with what should be covered and costs. Health: explicitly states physical and mental health insurance with wellness and has a monthly cost. Property: home/contents coverage described and cost provided. Travel: travel insurance described and cost provided. Additional services: notes integrated services and provides a cost (€0/month). Total budget: provides complete monthly cost breakdown (new, previous, savings). All items are present and sufficiently detailed per the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items: a health plan named 'Integrated Wellness Package (PrimeCare Premium Plans)', a property plan named 'EliteHome Premium Coverage with Home Office Protection', and a travel plan named 'EliteTravel Premium Plan'. From the ground-truth, the closest matching health items are PrimeCare Premium Plan (appears in both physical and mental health categories with rating 10). The property plan clearly maps to 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel plan exactly matches 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). The 'Integrated Wellness Package (PrimeCare Premium Plans)' suggests combining PrimeCare Premium Plan for both physical and mental health; both carry rating 10. We therefore map each referenced ground-truth item accordingly.
